zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Sadlier於1504年出生在英國爾南特維其時，她的父親Sir Henry Sadlier II24歲，母親Margaret Cromwell19歲。她於1522年與Rev John I Toldervey在英國英格蘭奧可福爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1583年在英國英格蘭奧可福爾奧可福德享年79歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Sadlier于1504年出生在英国爾南特維其时，她的父亲Sir Henry Sadlier II24岁，母亲Margaret Cromwell19岁。她于1522年与Rev John I Toldervey在英国英格兰奧可福爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1583年在英国英格兰奧可福爾奧可福德享年79岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sadlier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Claus, Kurt.
German, English, and Scottish: variant of   Sadler  .

variants.name: Sadler
meanings: English, Scottish, and German: occupational name for a maker or seller of saddles, from Middle English sadeler(e) ‘saddler’ or an agent derivative of Middle High German and Middle Low German sadel ‘saddle’. The name has also been established in Ireland since the 16th century. In North America, this surname has also absorbed other German variants (see Sattler and Sedler ) and cognates from other languages, e.g. Polish Siedlarz and Czech Sedlář, Slovak Sedlár, Slovenian and Croatian Sedlar . Compare Saddler .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Sadlier was born in 1504, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Henry Sadlier II, was 24 and her mother, Margaret Cromwell, was 19. She married Rev John I Toldervey in 1522, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1583, in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 79.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Sadlier est née en 1504, à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Sadlier II, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Cromwell, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Rev John I Toldervey en 1522, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1583, à Oxford, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 79 ans.

Sie hat 1522 in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Rev John I Toldervey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1583 im Alter von 79 Jahren in Oxford, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Rev John I Toldervey nel 1522, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1583, nel Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 79 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Sadlier(이)가 1504년 영국 체실르 난트위치에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry Sadlier II(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Cromwell(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1522년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 Rev John I Toldervey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1583년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스퍼드에서 79세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Sadlier родилась в 1504 г. в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Henry Sadlier II было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Cromwell, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Rev John I Toldervey в 1522 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1583 г. в местности оксфорд, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 79 лет.
